title: _onlineUsers.clear() misaligned indentation in auth failure block
description: relay_service.dart ~line 232: the _onlineUsers.clear() line has 8 extra spaces of indentation vs. the surrounding _typingTimers lines, making it look like it's nested inside something when it's not. Rewrite: remove extra leading spaces so all three cleanup lines align. This was introduced when auth-failure cleanup was added in the same commit — dart format would have caught it.
